name: clipocr
title: ClipOCR
description: Extract text from a selected Windows screen area with local Tesseract OCR
author: chswei

commands.name: index
commands.title: Area OCR
commands.description: Select a screen area and extract its text

preferences.name: tesseract_path
preferences.title: Tesseract binary path
preferences.description: Absolute path to your tesseract.exe. Leave the default if you installed Tesseract in Program Files.

preferences.name: autodetect_lang
preferences.title: Autodetect language
preferences.label: Enable language autodetect
preferences.description: Enable automatic language detection. Tesseract language will be used as a fallback if detection fails or doesn't find a suitable language.

preferences.name: tesseract_lang
preferences.title: Tesseract language
preferences.description: Language used for OCR. Use + for mixed languages, such as chi_tra+eng. Run tesseract --list-langs for available languages.

preferences.name: newLine
preferences.title: How to treat new lines
preferences.description: Controls how OCR line breaks are copied to the clipboard.

preferences.name: tesseract_psm
preferences.title: Tesseract page segmentation mode
preferences.description: Controls how Tesseract segments the selected area. Single block usually works best for selected text snippets.

preferences.name: chinesePunctuation
preferences.title: Chinese punctuation cleanup
preferences.label: Normalize punctuation around Chinese text
preferences.description: Convert common half-width punctuation near Chinese characters into full-width Chinese punctuation.
